name: Login Credentials Form
notes: POST form at LoginForm.jsx lines 95-115 (the <form> element and its children). Rendered by App.jsx when AuthContext.isAuthenticated is false; no dedicated /login route.

onSubmit calls AuthContext.login(email, password), which chains POST /api/auth/login → POST /api/auth/refresh; the /refresh step throws unconditionally (FR-007) because the backend returns { session: {...} } instead of { token, refreshToken }.
No client-side validation beyond HTML5 required attribute on both inputs — no regex, no min-length check.

Two independent error display paths: this.state.error (catches exceptions thrown by login()) and this.context.error (set inside AuthProvider on axios failure); both render as separate

elements below the form.
